notes: Evals re-run 2026-04-24 via skill-creator simulation (read-only general-purpose subagents). 6 subagent runs (3 evals × with_skill + without_skill). Benchmark: with_skill 83% vs without_skill 67% (+0.17 delta). Key finding: quality-gate eval reveals the skill runs composer check:strict post-all-tasks (not mid-task per the eval expectation). Model-guard is the strong differentiator (+100% vs 0%). See evals/workspace/iteration-1/benchmark.md for full stats.

runs.method: skill-creator simulation (read-only general-purpose subagent, no Edit/Write)

assertions.id: Reads tasks.md and identifies pending tasks
assertions.note: Via 'openspec instructions apply --change register-export --json' CLI output, not direct file read.
Step 7 'For each pending task' loop with numbered progress output.
Step 7 mandates PHPUnit tests for every new service/controller (at least 3 test methods).
Immediately after each task via plan.json tracking_issue lookup.
SKILL GAP: quality gate runs post-all-tasks (Step 9), not between tasks. A task-1 lint failure does not block task-2 — it surfaces only at Step 9.

assertions.id: Fixes issues before moving to next task
assertions.note: Fixes happen at Step 9 after the full implementation loop. Per-task blocking is not how the skill is structured.

runs.notes: Eval expectations assume per-task quality blocking. Skill consolidates checks post-loop. Either update eval expectations to match (post-loop is valid) or add lightweight lint-after-each-task sub-step.

assertions.note: Step 0 — first instruction before any other action.
Names both with exact /model commands. Guard bypassed for HYDRA_HEADLESS=1 (Haiku builder intentionally opts out).
